title: schradera cernua
intro: Schradera cernua, also known as the drooping schradera, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Schradera cernua include its potential to aid in reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections. Herbal preparations of Schradera cernua typically involve infusions or decoctions made from its leaves and roots, which are used to treat a range of ailments.
